product_overview: NUSA Toko Online is a customer-facing storefront for NUSA Kasir users, allowing shoppers to browse a store’s catalog, place pickup orders, and track order status through a unique store URL. It also provides a landing page with branding and an APK download link.
core_goals: Browse a store’s products by category and search
Add selected products to a cart and review the order
Complete checkout by providing customer details, pickup time, and payment method
Receive an order confirmation with an invoice number
Track existing orders by WhatsApp number and cancel eligible orders

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: A simple branding page for NUSA Toko Online with a download link for the Android APK.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See NUSA branding and description -> Click "Download APK" link to GitHub releases

features.name: Store Product Browsing
features.description: Browse a store’s published products, search and filter the catalog, and add items to the cart.
user_flows: Navigate to /toko/[storeId] -> See store header with name and open hours -> Browse the product grid -> Filter products by category -> Search products by name -> View matching products and stock indicators -> Select a product card to add it to the cart -> See the sticky cart summary with item count and total

Navigate to /toko/[storeId] -> See store header with name and open hours -> Browse the product grid -> View a product marked as out of stock -> Select the product card to add it to the cart -> See the sticky cart summary update

features.name: Cart Management
features.description: Review items already added to the cart and adjust the order before checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to /toko/[storeId] -> Open the cart view -> See cart items with unit price, quantity, and subtotal -> Increase an item quantity -> Decrease an item quantity -> See the subtotal summary update -> Continue to checkout
Navigate to /toko/[storeId] -> Open the cart view -> See cart items with unit price, quantity, and subtotal -> Reduce an item quantity to zero -> See the item removed from the cart
Navigate to /toko/[storeId] -> Open the cart view -> See cart items with unit price, quantity, and subtotal -> Clear all cart items -> See an empty cart

features.name: Checkout
features.description: Enter customer details, choose fulfillment and payment options, review the order, and submit it.
user_flows: Navigate to /toko/[storeId] -> Open the checkout view -> Fill in customer name -> Fill in WhatsApp number -> Select a pickup time -> Select a payment method -> Add optional notes -> Review the order summary -> Submit the order -> See the success confirmation
Navigate to /toko/[storeId] -> Open the checkout view -> Leave the customer name empty -> Submit the order -> See validation feedback for the required name field
Navigate to /toko/[storeId] -> Open the checkout view -> Leave the WhatsApp number empty -> Submit the order -> See validation feedback for the required WhatsApp field
Navigate to /toko/[storeId] -> Open the checkout view -> Keep the cart empty -> Submit the order -> See validation feedback that an order cannot be submitted without items

features.name: Order Success
features.description: Confirm that the order was placed successfully and provide next-step actions.
user_flows: Complete checkout successfully -> See a green checkmark and the "Pesanan Berhasil!" message -> See the invoice number displayed -> Return to product browsing
Complete checkout successfully -> See a green checkmark and the "Pesanan Berhasil!" message -> See the invoice number displayed -> Go to order tracking

features.name: Order Tracking
features.description: Search for existing orders by WhatsApp number, review order details and status, and cancel orders that are still newly placed.
user_flows: Navigate to /toko/[storeId] -> Open the order tracking view -> Enter a WhatsApp number -> Search for orders -> See a list of matching orders with invoice, items, status badge, date, payment method, and total

Navigate to /toko/[storeId] -> Open the order tracking view -> Enter a WhatsApp number -> Search for orders -> See an order with status "Online Baru" -> Cancel the order -> Confirm the cancellation -> See the order status change to cancelled
Navigate to /toko/[storeId] -> Open the order tracking view -> Enter a WhatsApp number -> Search for orders -> See orders with non-new statuses -> Review the order list without a cancel option

routes.description: Landing page — branding NUSA, download APK link
Dynamic storefront — product browsing, cart, checkout, order tracking

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Branding page for NUSA Toko Online with download APK link
user_interactions: See NUSA branding and description
Click "Download APK" link to GitHub releases

features.name: Store Product Browsing
features.description: Customer browses products by category with search, adds to cart
user_interactions: See store header with name and open hours
Search products by name via search input
Filter products by category (Semua, Makanan, Minuman, Sembako, Lainnya)
Click product card to add to cart
See sticky cart button with item count and total at bottom
See "Habis" or "Sisa X" stock indicators

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase store_settings (eq store_id, eq is_active true)
Supabase online_products (eq store_id, eq is_published true)

features.name: Cart Management
features.description: Review and modify cart items, adjust quantities, clear cart
user_interactions: View cart items with name, unit price, quantity, subtotal
Increase/decrease quantity with +/- buttons
Remove item by reducing quantity to 0
Clear all cart items
See subtotal summary
Click "Lanjutkan ke Checkout"

features.name: Checkout
features.description: Fill customer info, pickup time, payment method, notes; submit order
user_interactions: Fill customer name (required)
Fill WhatsApp number (required)
Select pickup time from dropdown (Segera, 30 menit, 1 jam, 2 jam, Besok)
Select payment method (Tunai, QRIS, Transfer)
Add optional notes
Review order summary with all items and total
Click "Pesan Sekarang" to submit
See validation alerts if name/phone/cart empty

features.name: Order Success
features.description: Confirmation screen after successful order placement
user_interactions: See green checkmark and "Pesanan Berhasil!" message
See invoice number displayed
Click "Kembali" to return to product browsing
Click "Lacak Pesanan" to go to order tracking

features.name: Order Tracking
features.description: Track orders by WhatsApp number with status display and cancel capability
user_interactions: Enter WhatsApp number to search
Click "Cari" to load orders
See order list with invoice, items, status badge, date, payment method, total
See status with color-coded badges (Online Baru=amber, Disiapkan=green, etc.)
Cancel order if status is "Online Baru" with confirmation dialog

known_limitations.issue: Product images use placeholder emoji (📦) — no real image upload implemented
known_limitations.impact: All products show the same box emoji instead of actual product photos

known_limitations.issue: No stock validation at checkout — customer can order even if stock is 0
known_limitations.impact: Customers can place orders for out-of-stock items; stock display is informational only

known_limitations.issue: Order cancellation only works for "Online Baru" status — no guard in UI for other statuses but API enforces it
known_limitations.impact: Customers may try to cancel orders that are already being prepared; button only shows for "Online Baru" status

known_limitations.issue: No loading indicators on product add-to-cart — no visual feedback that item was added
known_limitations.impact: Users may not realize an item was added to cart, leading to duplicate taps

known_limitations.issue: Cart state is lost on page refresh — no persistence (localStorage or similar)
known_limitations.impact: Accidental refresh or back navigation loses all cart items
